  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Audio
    A class for playing .wav audio files.
    Clock
    This class is used to work with time.
    Color
    A class that stores color values in integer form 0-255.
    Draw
    A class with only static members that is used for drawing shapes to the window or a surface.
    Event
    A class that represents an event
    Events
    A class that manages the events of windows.
    Font
    A class that represents a font with methods to render text with this font.
    Image
    A class designed to handle image loading.
    Key
    An enumerator that contains all the possible key events.
    Mouse
    ---advanced--- This class should only be instantiated by Obsidium.
    Obsidium
    The central class for creating windows and retrieving properties of the current device.
    Surface
    A class that represents an image.
    Transform
    A class with only static members that is used to transform images(Surface).
    Type
    An enumerator that contains all the possible types of events.
    Vector2
    A class that can be instantiated to hold 2 integers that represent the coordinates x and y.
    Vector2D
    A class that can be instantiated to hold 2 doubles that represent the coordinates x and y.
    Window
    A window object that represents a window on your screen.
